Requirement: All capacitors must have voltage ratings at least 20% above rail voltage.
Explainability: All capacitors meet the voltage rating requirement.
C100 on 3V3 rail (3.0V) has 10V rating, exceeding the 3.6V minimum.
C101 on 5V rail has 5V rating, below the required 6.0V minimum.

Requirement: All power nets must have decoupling capacitors within 5mm of IC pins.

Explainability: VCC_3V3 has C100 placed 2mm from U1 pin 1.
